summary: This document is an official call for applications issued by A.Di.S.U.R.C., the agency responsible for university student support in the Campania region of Italy. Its main purpose is to announce and regulate the awarding of scholarships, accommodation places, and international mobility grants for the 2025/2026 academic year. Key topics covered include eligibility criteria, types of recipients, application deadlines, conditions related to enrollment and academic status, compatibility with other benefits, and legal publication requirements.
